item.title: Have some bad life choices.
item.description:
Can't park there mate.
Can't park there either mate.
That's not a good spot either mate.
Mate....
I mean... At least he didn't park there.
The one time they CAN park there, they still fuck it up.
5/7 parking job.
If you had a nickel for every time you saw someone step in front of a bicycle and get run over, you'd have two nickels. Which isn’t much, but it’s weird that it happened twice
Good ol' Jacko "thunderballs" Brodie they call him.
You'd think that someone who's forklift certified would have more common sense. Nice parking job though.
Is this one of those self parking vehicles I keep hearing about?
Am I out of parking jokes? Yes. Yes I am.
Err.. Peter, is it going to be fine? Shouldn't this be done by a plumber? Look, here's the problem.
What in the final destination is this?

item.title: Ive done the 50 hr minimum as an engineer and all I want to tell him is to get bent
item.description: This fucker is the most arrogant, narcissistic sociopath I've ever met. If I want to drive down engineering hours to improve the area while improving our engineer's mental wellbeing, I see absolutely no issue. Fuck corporate america and fuck capitalism

item.title: What Happened Today #105
item.description: ??️ The government that should protect you is being weaponized against you instead. While Trump offers donors VIP access to military parades featuring soldiers who get only one hot meal per day and will sleep on office floors, his administration revokes security clearances despite court orders, investigates critics, deports students over traffic tickets, and even pitches a dystopian reality show where migrants compete for citizenship. And those tariffs? Walmart says they will pass the cost on to us soon in the form of price increases. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email at the website GovBrief.today now. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/gaza-freedom-zone 2. https://go.govbrief.today/sort-of-deal 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-putin-only-peace 4. https://go.govbrief.today/un-slow-growth 5. https://go.govbrief.today/walmart-raise-prices 6. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-flouride-ban 7. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-accused-fraud 8. https://www.yahoo.com/news/tanks-cannons-soldiers-sleeping-dc-115133747.html 9. https://go.govbrief.today/military-dysphoria-screening 10. https://go.govbrief.today/va-mandatory-overtime 11. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-corruption-unit 12. https://go.govbrief.today/martin-ethics-probe 13. https://go.govbrief.today/baraka-fingerprinted-again 14. https://go.govbrief.today/dugan-pleads-not-guilty 15. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-reality-show 16. https://go.govbrief.today/military-trespass-dismissed 17. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-rescinds-order 18. https://go.govbrief.today/states-secret-privilege 19. https://go.govbrief.today/comey-investigation-post 20. https://go.govbrief.today/law-firm-clearances 21. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-not-ready 22. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-fires-hundreds 23. https://go.govbrief.today/donors-parade-access 24. https://go.govbrief.today/denver-airport-outage 25. https://go.govbrief.today/student-wins-injunction Have a great Friday, Imgur. I'll catch up with you this weekend because we are late today!

item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Fascists eat their young
item.description: From an interview with Tony Gilroy, discussing where the most competent Imperial characters end up at the end of Andor Season 2. "Fascism doesn't just take down the oppressed. It doesn't just come for the people it's trying to control. It inevitably destroys the people who've worked the hardest to build it. And that's been true all through history as well." I love the care and passion that went into making this show, including the allusions to revolutions in real-world history. Link to interview: https://youtube.com/clip/UgkxHuGfYBmMxZALpViL9XTy3hHHfYPyAVau

item.title: A Tree Sitter Is Protecting A Forest In Washington State
item.description:
Olympic Forest Defenders say that the 192-acre forest slated to be cut is one of the last low-elevation mature forests in the Elwha watershed, and contains complex ecosystems, critical habitat, and developing old-growth characteristics. It also is the main forest in the watershed protecting the drinking water for the residents of Port Angeles. And it protects the salmon in the newly restored Elwha River nearby.
“People have been fighting this sale for two years,” said organizer Davis. “There have been rallies and attempts to obtain Trust Land Transfers. The City of Port Angeles asked Commissioner Upthegrove to halt the sale. The tree sitter is up there now because all other tactics have failed.”
Another organizer criticized the police presence at the base of the tree sit, who they claim harassed the tree-sitter all night with a loud generator and bright lights, and removed activists on the ground providing ground support.
Forest activists have placed barriers on the road attached to cables which are also attached to the tree sitter's shelter- if the barriers are removed by the cops or the loggers the shelter would fall and kill the tree sitter.
"I'm not going anywhere," said the tree sitter, using the moniker Red Breasted Nuthatch, in a statement released May 9. "Our new lands commissioner, Dave Upthegrove, promised to protect mature forests; we are here to help him keep his promise."
Here's ways to help: Here's the Olympic Forest Defenders Gofundme https://www.gofundme.com/f/accsvm-olympic-forest-defenders Message from the sitter: "Thank you for donating everyone! It is incredible to have so much support in this, from folks showing up on the ground to those helping with phone calls to those donating to our campaign. We have raised a lot of money! I am hopeful that we can maintain this sit for as long as needed without financial pressure, and even have enough leftover to buy equipment for the newly formed Olympic Forest Defenders to continue awesome work on the peninsula. Thank you thank you thank you!!!!" The sitter is also encouraging people to continue pressure on DNR and the newly-elected Commissioner of Public Lands by calling Dave Upthegrove at 360-902-1000, extension 4, or emailing him at cpl@dnr.wa.gov. Please leave a message reiterating our demands: 1. Immediate cancellation of the "Parched" Timber Sale 2. A pause on all logging in the Elwha watershed 3. A permanent ban on logging the remaining mature forests in western Washington. In Solidarity, Olympic Forest Defenders

item.title: I need help one last time
item.description: I have been struggling to keep everything turned on, I have had to take advantage of everything under the sun to keep everything turned on and the family and cats fed. I finally have good news. I start work Monday. (That’s my schedule up there lol) It’s 25 ish hours a week to start but it’s in a pizza place and my first job was in a pizzeria so I kinda know what I’m doing. I won’t get paid for two weeks yet. I need support. https://gofund.me/441b9089 Cash app is $optimalzeromus Venmo @thomas-keiffer-1 PayPal pool https://www.paypal.com/pool/9eTFLLq7gt?sr=ancr I just need to keep things floating for the next two weeks, on top of gas now that I actually have a place to be. I thank you all for the support and advice I’ve gotten this entire time I’ve had to seek it.

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: Look ma, I'm bilingual.
item.description: I have to start first off by saying I didn't have it the worst. I know there are horror stories much worse than mine, and I know this because I lost a friend who I witnessed get beat on by his mother and his stepfather (a pastor) for the most asinine things. He took his own life a few years back, and I can't help but think a part of it had to be the abuse he and his brother garnered, and with the lack of support and compassion by his parents when he hit the bottom he just gave up. It wasn't until I started therapy for my own SI that my therapist recognized in our meetings that I would say things and show signs of an abused person. Until then, I just thought that that was life and what everyone had to deal with. Even still, I'm hesitant to declare myself abused, as my parents never beat me. But they didn't have to. My mother specialized in emotional manipulation, and she had her other children to do the physical work. If you ask them, they would probably say they were trying to toughen me up or teach me their version of right. But the bruises they left and the brokenness I felt by the actions of my loved ones tell a different tale. So yeah, I for eternity feel like I'm walking on eggshells, I'm in stasis anticipating that next shoe to drop, I flench anytime someone is being dominant over me, and I cower everytime you start to raise your voice and I feel like the littlest person even if I've done nothing wrong. If you're being abused or you know someone who is, please seek help or help for them because not everyone survives. I miss you, Drew, and I'm so sorry I didn't do more to help you, I was too young and too dumb to understand how much that hardship could affect someone forever.
item.dc:creator: Discoball10

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1362 (incan conspiracy)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I enjoy fucking with my stupider, more bigoted brethren that the actual LGBTQ+ plot is to restore the Empire of Four Quarters (Tawantinsuyu) and that they didn't steal the rainbow from "God", but instead stole it from the Inca.
I had a Townsend's Warbler in the same binocular view of a male Western Tanager yesterday, which was nice. I love Western Tanagers. They glow like gold and jet gems in the green of the forest.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Memes and stuff: heaven and hell are the same thing if they last forever. You’ll get bored either way.
item.description:
I really only play casually anymore. Demigod of revenge is an auto 3 to 4 of in my red decks to make sure I have lethal.
I love the idea of some monks being followed by a herd of cats while making kitty calling noises.
I’ll get to my backlog eventually. SMTV has several endings, and I haven’t even touched the canon of vengeance yet….
The same people that said stimulus checks would make people not work because of “basic economics” are the ones confused by tariffs.
When my partner goes off on some anime or car thing.
Facts
I love orange himbos
I got a new laundry basket today. I was excited.
I don’t like quitters, lol
Use a dry erase marker on it, it should rehydrate it and it might come off. Maybe
I’ve been getting more practice. Just saying.
Yes
Any time I get too bratty, it’s the first thing my partner suggest.
I would call him, but I’ve moved on.
No wonder I’m good with a strap.
I love the implications, lol
I haven’t got back on TikTok since they blocked it the first time.
Me talking to any straight white person.
I’m quality over quantity. I want to be spanked hard and deliberately, instead we of fast a whippy.
Sploosh
It’s my one way to express myself artistically.
Both
STAX is only fun for one person.
This laundry basket is making me hungry for some reason….
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex
